programme.title: 2009. A partida entre Raimon e Epsilon Remastered continua sua segunda metade. Embora eles tentem o seu melhor, Desarm é muito rápido e poderoso para eles. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - My Two Big Daddies
programme.desc: Posing as a single father, Steve (Steve Harvey) uses young Romeo (Merlin Santana) to rope in an attractive single mother (guest star Alex Datcher).

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Boomerang
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) becomes a fool for love when he falls for Reginas (Wendy Raquel Robinson) friend (guest star Roxanne Beckford). With William Lee Scott.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - All About Steve
programme.desc: A power-hungry Steve fills in for Regina as acting principal for a few days; Cedric and Lovita disagree about their wedding day.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Going, Going, Gone
programme.desc: Steve participates in a bachelor auction where a beautiful young bidder turns out to be a front for an older woman.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Y2K
programme.desc: After Steves extravagant plans fall apart, he rings in the new millennium with Regina, Cedric and Lovita.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Black Streak
programme.desc: Cedric (Cedric the Entertainer) prefers reliving his wild days rather than going to Steves (Steve Harvey) bachelor party. With Wendy Raquel Robinson.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Boy Trouble
programme.desc: A sexist school board member ignores Reginas funding proposal while green-lighting Steves harebrained ideas.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Guess Whos Not Coming to Counseling
programme.desc: Steve poses as Lovitas fiance when Cedric cant attend a counseling session with a renowned minister.

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Risk-Free Hearing Aid!
programme.desc: Call today to try the high quality, low-price Audien hearing aid, risk-free! No doctor or fittings necessary.

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Rateescape: Stop Overpaying for Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Never Scrub Your Floors Again

programme.desc: A rumpled detective gets a slick convict released into his custody for two days to help him find a murderer in San Francisco.

programme.title: Hercules (2014)
programme.desc: Now a traveling mercenary, Hercules must once again become a hero to help the benevolent king of Thrace protect his people from a powerful warlord.

programme.title: Sky Captain and the World of Tomorrow (2004)
programme.sub-title: Sky Captain and the World of Tomorrow (2004)
programme.desc: A daredevil aviator (Jude Law) and an ace reporter (Gwyneth Paltrow) fight an evil mastermind and his army of gigantic robots.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible III (2006)
programme.desc: Now a trainer for IMF recruits, agent Ethan Hunt squares off against the toughest foe he has ever faced, a ruthless arms and information broker.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible -- Ghost Protocol (2011)
programme.desc: The IMF is shut down when its implicated in the bombing of the Kremlin, causing Ethan Hunt and his new team to go rogue to clear their organizations name.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible Rogue Nation (2015)
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt (Tom Cruise) and his team take on their most impossible mission yet to eradicate the Syndicate -- a highly skilled, international organization dedicated to creating a new world order via a series of terrorist attacks.

programme.title: Audrey Rose (1977)
programme.desc: Parents (Marsha Mason, John Beck) of a girl notice odd behavior after a man (Anthony Hopkins) tells them she holds his dead daughters spirit.

programme.title: Death Rides a Horse (1969)
programme.desc: A young man (John Phillip Law) hunts his parents killers with a veteran gunfighter (Lee Van Cleef) who has something to hide.

programme.title: Support Your Local Gunfighter (1971)
programme.desc: A con man (James Garner) and his partner (Jack Elam) profit from mistaken identity in the mining town of Purgatory.

programme.title: Dirty Work (1998)

programme.title: Breakfast at Tiffanys (1961)
programme.desc: New York playgirl Holly Golightly (Audrey Hepburn) puzzles a writer (George Peppard) who lives in her building.

programme.title: The Madness of King George (1994)
programme.desc: The 18th-century British monarch (Nigel Hawthorne) loves his devoted queen (Helen Mirren) but illness dramatically affects his mind.

programme.title: Wildcat (2025)
programme.desc: An ex-black ops team reunites to pull off a desperate heist and save an eight-year-old girls life.

programme.title: The Presidio (1988)
programme.desc: An Army provost marshal (Sean Connery) clashes with a detective (Mark Harmon) over a murder at the San Francisco military base.

programme.title: Blink Twice (2024)
programme.desc: When tech billionaire Slater King meets Frida, he invites her to join him and his friends for a dream vacation on his private island. However, when strange things start to happen, shell have to uncover the truth if she hopes to make it out alive.

programme.title: Breakdown (1997)
programme.desc: A mans (Kurt Russell) wife (Kathleen Quinlan) disappears in the desert Southwest after accepting a truckers (J.T. Walsh) help with car trouble.

programme.desc: Two private investigators (Casey Affleck, Michelle Monaghan) tread dangerous ground as they scour the Boston underworld for a kidnapped child.

programme.desc: A womans tranquil existence gets upended when her husband invites a man, his wife and their two children as guests in their Victorian mansion. Terror soon strikes when she tries to figure out why her husband is so accommodating to everyone but her.

programme.title: Comes a Horseman (1978)

programme.title: In Harms Way (1965)

programme.sub-title: The Man in the Iron Mask (1998)

programme.desc: A scientist (Nicolas Cage) and a British spy (Sean Connery) who once escaped from Alcatraz are sent to the former island prison to stop a disgruntled war hero (Ed Harris) from obliterating San Francisco with chemical warheads.

programme.sub-title: In the Land of Saints and Sinners (2023)

programme.title: The Survivalist (2021)
programme.desc: A year and a half after the fall of civilization due to a viral outbreak, a former FBI agent is forced to protect a young woman immune to the disease from a dangerous gang leader hunting her.

programme.title: Dont Knock Twice (2016)
programme.desc: A mother looking to reconnect with her estranged daughter attracts the attention of a demonic witch.

programme.title: Not Without Hope (2025)
programme.desc: Four friends face disaster when their boat capsizes in the Gulf of Mexico. Battling massive waves, sharks, dehydration and hypothermia, they cling to hope as the Coast Guard launches a daring rescue through a raging storm to save them.

programme.title: Rush (2013)
programme.desc: Charismatic Englishman James Hunt (Chris Hemsworth) and Austrian perfectionist Niki Lauda (Daniel Bruhl) burn up the 1970s Formula 1 racing scene and share an intense rivalry on the track.

programme.title: The Running Man (1987)
programme.desc: A police-state scapegoat (Arnold Schwarzenegger) must play a TV hosts (Richard Dawson) deadly game show for the 21st-century masses.

programme.title: The Beldham (2024)
programme.desc: A struggling new mother fights a generations-old presence lurking within her familys home, threatening her safety, her sanity, and the life of her infant child.

programme.title: Vicious (2025)
programme.desc: A strange ritual soon unravels into a waking nightmare when a woman receives a mysterious box that comes with instructions to place three things inside: something you need, something you hate, and something you love.

programme.title: Abandon (2002)
programme.desc: A detective (Benjamin Bratt) discovers new facts regarding the disappearance of a collegians (Katie Holmes) boyfriend (Charlie Hunnam) two years earlier.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in the West (1968)
programme.sub-title: Once Upon a Time in the West (1968)
programme.desc: An outlaw (Henry Fonda) working for a railroad magnate fights a stranger (Charles Bronson) for a New Orleans widows (Claudia Cardinale) land.

programme.title: Rumours (2024)
programme.desc: Leaders of the worlds wealthiest democracies become spectacles of incompetence, contending with increasingly surreal obstacles as night falls in the misty woods, and they realize they are suddenly alone.

programme.title: The Longest War
programme.desc: The human stories and drama behind Americas involvement in Afghanistan, now the longest war in U.S. history; features interviews with intelligence operatives, soldiers, families, Afghan officials, journalists, and government and military officials.

programme.title: Deadlock (2021)
programme.desc: A retired Army ranger must save thousands of innocent lives when a rogue team of mercenaries brutally seizes an energy plant and holds everyone inside hostage.

programme.title: Breakdown (1997)
programme.desc: A mans (Kurt Russell) wife (Kathleen Quinlan) disappears in the desert Southwest after accepting a truckers (J.T. Walsh) help with car trouble.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day (1991)
programme.desc: Two cyborgs from the future battle over the life of a teen (Edward Furlong) who will someday lead humanity against the machines.

programme.title: Deep Impact (1998)
programme.desc: As a comet is on a collision course with earth, humans have to prepare for their survival. They randomly select eight hundred thousand people to be saved in order to keep the human race alive.

programme.title: Along Came a Spider (2001)
programme.desc: A detective (Morgan Freeman) and a Secret Service agent (Monica Potter) investigate the abduction of a senators daughter from a school.

programme.title: Frank Millers Sin City (2005)
programme.desc: Lawmen, prostitutes (Devon Aoki, Alexis Bledel), a hulking thug and other sordid characters run amok in a crime-ridden metropolis.

programme.title: Maniac (2012)
programme.desc: A serial killer (Elijah Wood) removes his victims scalps and attaches them to the vintage mannequins he restores in his late mothers shop.

programme.title: Wrong Turn (2021)
programme.desc: Despite warnings to stick to the Appalachian Trail, hikers stray off course and cross into land inhabited by a hidden community of mountain dwellers who use deadly means to protect their way of life.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity 2 (2010)
programme.desc: After experiencing what they think are break-ins, a family realizes that the events unfolding before them are more sinister than they seem.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity 3 (2011)
programme.desc: A videographer becomes obsessed with finding the source of disturbing late-night noises in his home and discovers its terrifying origin.

programme.title: Hard Rain (1998)
programme.desc: A thief (Morgan Freeman), a sheriff (Randy Quaid) and the nephew (Christian Slater) of an armored-truck driver seek money bags in a flooding Indiana town.

programme.title: Undisputed III: Redemption (2010)
programme.desc: Uri Boyka is an inmate trapped in the toughest prison in the world. He is ready to make his comeback in a lethal boxing competition for a shot at freedom.

programme.title: The Honey Trap: A True Story of Love, Lies and the FBI
programme.desc: The story of Denis Cuspert, aka Deso Dogg, and his journey from infamous German rapper to ISIS recruiter; exploring the circular relationship between propaganda, recruitment and the soft power of entertainment culture.

programme.title: The Core (2003)
programme.desc: In order to save mankind, scientists and astronauts must set off a nuclear device at the center of the Earth.

programme.title: Gangs of New York (2002)
programme.desc: During the era of Tammany Halls sway, a young man (Leonardo DiCaprio) vows vengeance on the vicious gangster (Daniel Day-Lewis) who killed his father.

programme.title: Jack Reacher (2012)
programme.desc: A defense attorney hires an enigmatic ex-Army investigator to tackle the case of a highly trained sniper who apparently murdered five people at random.

programme.title: Jackass Presents: Bad Grandpa (2013)
programme.desc: Irving Zisman (Johnny Knoxville) takes his young and impressionable grandson (Jackson Nicoll) on a cross-country trip in which they encounter male strippers, biker-bar patrons and other unsuspecting citizens.

programme.title: Jackass: The Movie (2002)
programme.desc: Nitwits (Johnny Knoxville, Bam Margera, Chris Pontius) perform outrageous stunts and pull practical jokes on an unsuspecting public.

programme.title: Django Unchained (2012)
programme.desc: A former slave (Jamie Foxx) joins forces with the German bounty hunter (Christoph Waltz) who freed him and helps hunt down the Souths most-wanted criminals, all in the hope of finding his long-lost wife (Kerry Washington).

programme.title: If You Lust Me
programme.desc: A young woman puts the age-old adage of love at first sight to the test when a stranger professes his undying devotion. But is he sincere or is it just another con by some hustler trying to get her in bed? She decides to give him a test... of sorts..

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn (1996)
programme.desc: Desperado brothers (George Clooney, Quentin Tarantino) kidnap a preacher (Harvey Keitel) and his kids, commandeer their RV and wind up in a Mexican strip joint where vampires lurk.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity: The Ghost Dimension (2015)
programme.desc: An old and mysterious camcorder leads to the discovery of a supernatural terror in a familys new home.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity 4 (2012)
programme.desc: A teenager (Kathryn Newton) bears witness to terrifying events that occur when she and her family become the temporary caretakers of a creepy neighbor boy.

programme.title: Wander (2020)
programme.desc: Hired to investigate a suspicious death in the town of Wander, a paranoid private eye with a troubled past becomes convinced the case is linked to the same conspiracy and cover-up that caused the death of his daughter.

programme.title: Chuck (2016)
programme.desc: Liquor salesman and part-time prizefighter Chuck Wepner gets the chance to take on Muhammad Ali in a highly publicized title fight, launching him to sudden fame.

programme.title: Captive (2015)

programme.title: Good Kill (2014)
programme.desc: An Air Force drone pilot (Ethan Hawke) begins to question the ethics of dropping bombs on Afghanistan from the safety of his post in Las Vegas.

programme.title: No Code of Conduct (1998)

programme.title: Cypher (2002)
programme.desc: A man (Jeremy Northam) soon becomes confused about his own identity after he becomes a corporate spy for each of two rival firms.

programme.title: Yes, Madam (1985)

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider (2001)

programme.title: Sound of Violence (2021)

programme.title: Asking for It (2022)
programme.desc: A victim of sexual assault joins an all-female gang that targets violent frat boys and a corrupt police force of human traffickers.

programme.title: Mollys Game (2017)
